summary: 本周GitHub Trending共收录 63 个热门项目，新上榜 63 个，以Python项目为主（17个），主要集中在AI工具/LLM应用（29个）、其他（8个）方向，榜首chopratejas作为本周AI工具/LLM应用方向的明星项目登顶（3938 stars），反映出开发者对AI工具和智能体的持续旺盛需求。

top_10.title: sponsors/chopratejas
top_10.content: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

top_10.title: sponsors/mattpocock
top_10.content: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

top_10.content: TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.

top_10.content: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

top_10.content: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.

top_10.content: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
